title: WD3 9SQ, Thames Water Utilities Appeal (Maple Lodge) Conditions attached to a permit - EPR/FP3435LA/V006
body: "The decision taken by the Environment Agency on conditions of a permit application for an installations permit at Maple Lodge Sludge Treatment Centre, Denham Way, Rickmansworth, WD3 9SQ  The decision includes the appeal documents for:  Operator name: Thames Water Utilities  Facility name: Maple Lodge Sludge Treatment Centre  Permit number: EPR/FP3435LA/V006 "
